page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T24 processor architecture running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance scoring in the top 25%. However, multi-core scaling shows some limitations; stress-ng multi-core performance and PassMark CPU scores fall within the average range, while multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and database operations register in the bottom 25%. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, and AVX512_BF16, alongside hardware-accelerated cryptography via AES and SHA_NI.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.g8a.xlarge offers a standard general-purpose profile with dedicated CPU allocation, avoiding the performance variability of shared-core alternatives. Given its weak performance in high-throughput database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving, this instance is best suited for moderate general-purpose workloads, single-threaded application servers, and lightweight background processing tasks rather than high-concurrency databases or heavy web-serving environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor at 2.7 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance lacks local storage and GPUs, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data shows strong single-core CPU performance, though multi-core scaling and database operations fall into the average and weak categories respectively. Supported instruction sets include AVX-512 and hardware-accelerated cryptography. This instance is best suited for moderate general-purpose workloads, single-threaded applications, and lightweight background tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core but average multi-core performance.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC general-purpose instance delivering strong single-core performance and balanced memory-to-CPU resources for standard workloads.
